config.tenant_features_desc: Enable or disable platform features and modules for this tenant
config.module_configuration_desc: Enable, disable, and configure platform modules and features
config.platform_infrastructure_desc: Tenant-wide settings: languages, maps, and API keys.
config.translation_settings_desc: Configure automatic translation, glossary, and per-tenant translation preferences
config.translation_engine_desc: Select the provider used for automatic translations
config.translation_enabled_desc: Allow users to translate content on this platform
config.translation_context_aware_desc: Use surrounding messages for higher quality translations
config.translation_context_messages_desc: Number of previous messages to include as context (1-20)
config.translation_auto_translate_desc: Automatically translate incoming content for users in a different language
config.translation_rate_limit_label: Max translations per user per hour
config.translation_rate_limit_desc: Prevents abuse of the translation API
config.translation_glossary_enabled_desc: Use a custom glossary to enforce specific translations for terms
config.translation_glossary_management_desc: Add custom translations for specific terms
config.modal_group_management_desc: Open the full Groups administration area for approvals, moderation, types, organisation, recommendations, ranking, analytics, and individual group management.
config.module_desc_exchange_workflow: Structured exchange requests with broker approval
config.module_desc_search: Full-text search across listings, members, and content
config.module_desc_marketplace: Commercial buy/sell marketplace for physical goods and paid services
config.module_desc_courses: Community learning — courses, lessons, quizzes, enrollment, and certificates
config.module_desc_explore: Curated discovery page surfacing members, listings, events and more
config.module_desc_podcasts: Community audio — member-created shows, episodes, transcripts, chapters, RSS, and moderation
config.module_desc_identity_verification: Stripe Identity verification with ID Verified badge, document + selfie matching, and configurable fee
config.module_desc_caring_community: Integrated hub for time banking, volunteering, organisations, impact, and mutual aid
config.module_desc_merchant_coupons: Discount coupons issued by marketplace merchants. Separate from closed-loop time-credit redemption. Requires Marketplace to be enabled.
config.module_desc_member_premium: One-off and recurring donations with supporter recognition, not paid features.
config.module_desc_ai_agents: Autonomous AI agents that can run jobs, propose actions, and assist with platform operations.
config.module_desc_partner_api: Allow external partners to integrate with this tenant via the Partner API. Exposes the Integrations admin section.
config.module_desc_regional_analytics: Paid regional analytics product - monthly reports sold to municipalities and regional bodies. Super-admin managed.
config.module_desc_newsletter: Email newsletter campaigns, subscribers, segments, templates, and analytics.
config.module_desc_message_translation: Auto-translate direct messages between members who speak different languages.
config.module_desc_two_factor_authentication: Allow members to enrol in authenticator-app 2FA. Turning this off preserves and continues to enforce existing enrolments.
config.module_desc_biometric_login: Allow passkey sign-in using face, fingerprint, device PIN, or security keys. Turning this module off stops both passkey authentication and new enrolment.
config.option_two_factor_allow_trusted_devices_: Let members skip the second factor on a device they explicitly trust. Turning this off revokes active trusted-device sessions.
config.option_two_factor_trusted_device_days_de: How long a newly trusted device can skip the second factor.
config.option_two_factor_backup_code_count_desc: Number of one-time recovery codes generated for future 2FA enrolments.
config.option_passkeys_enrollment_enabled_desc: Let members add new passkeys. Turn this off to pause enrolment while existing passkey sign-in remains available.
config.option_passkeys_max_credentials_per_user: Limit how many passkeys one member can register (1–20).
config.option_passkeys_conditional_autofill_des: Offer existing passkeys from the email field when the browser supports conditional mediation.
config.module_config_load_error_title: Authentication controls could not be verified
config.module_config_load_error_desc: Module states are hidden until the current tenant configuration can be loaded safely.
config.passkey_disable_warning: This is an emergency tenant-wide switch. Existing passkeys will remain stored, but nobody in this community will be able to use them to sign in until you enable the module again.
config.passkey_disable_registered_users_one: {{count}} member currently has a registered passkey.
config.passkey_disable_passkey_only_users_one: {{count}} member may have no other usable sign-in method.
config.passkey_disable_passkey_only_users_other: {{count}} members may have no other usable sign-in method.
config.passkey_disable_recovery: Confirm that affected members have a recovery route, such as password reset, a connected provider, or administrator-assisted recovery.
config.passkey_disable_impact_unavailable: The security impact could not be loaded. Refresh this page before disabling passkey authentication.
config.option_podcasts_allow_member_show_creati: Allow ordinary members to create podcast shows. This is on by default.
config.option_podcasts_max_shows_per_user_desc: Maximum number of shows one member can own. Set to 0 for no limit.
config.option_podcasts_moderation_enabled_desc: Newly published shows and episodes stay pending until an admin approves them. Off by default.
config.option_podcasts_enable_rss_feed_desc: Publish standards-compatible RSS feeds for public shows.
config.option_podcasts_enable_private_shows_des: Allow creators to keep shows private or members-only.
config.option_podcasts_enable_transcripts_desc: Allow episode transcripts for accessibility and search.
config.option_podcasts_enable_episode_reactions: Allow members to react to episodes.
config.option_podcasts_enable_listen_analytics_: Record tenant-scoped listens and completion signals.
config.option_podcasts_max_audio_size_mb_desc: Maximum episode audio file size in megabytes for future uploads.
config.option_podcasts_media_storage_driver_des: Choose local private storage or a configured cloud disk for hosted podcast audio.
config.option_podcasts_cloud_storage_disk_desc: Laravel filesystem disk to use when Media Storage is Cloud.
config.option_podcasts_cloud_cdn_base_url_desc: Optional public CDN base URL for hosted podcast audio in cloud storage.
config.option_podcasts_enable_media_scanning_de: Mark uploaded audio for malware/security scanning before operational review.
config.option_podcasts_enable_media_processing_: Mark uploaded audio for duration extraction, waveform generation, and normalization jobs.
config.option_listing_moderation_enabled_desc: New listings must be approved by an admin before going live
config.option_listing_auto_approve_trusted_desc: Automatically approve listings from verified/trusted members
config.option_listing_max_per_user_desc: Maximum number of active listings a member can have
config.option_listing_max_images_desc: Maximum number of images that can be uploaded per listing
config.option_listing_max_image_size_mb_desc: Maximum file size for listing images in megabytes
config.option_listing_require_image_desc: Listings must include at least one image
config.option_listing_min_title_length_desc: Minimum characters required for listing title
config.option_listing_min_description_length_de: Minimum characters required for listing description
config.option_listing_allow_offers_desc: Members can create service offer listings
config.option_listing_allow_requests_desc: Members can create service request listings
config.option_listing_require_category_desc: Listings must be assigned to a category
config.option_listing_require_hours_estimate_de: Listings must include an estimated time
config.option_listing_enable_skill_tags_desc: Allow members to add skill tags to listings
config.option_listing_enable_service_type_desc: Show service type options (remote, in-person, hybrid)
config.option_listing_auto_expire_days_desc: Automatically expire listings after this many days (0 = never)
config.option_listing_max_renewals_desc: Maximum number of times a listing can be renewed
config.option_listing_renewal_days_desc: How many days each renewal extends the listing
config.option_listing_expiry_reminders_desc: Send email reminders before listings expire
config.option_listing_featured_duration_days_de: Default number of days a listing stays featured
config.option_listing_enable_ai_descriptions_de: Allow members to generate descriptions using AI
config.option_listing_enable_reporting_desc: Allow members to report inappropriate listings
config.option_listing_enable_map_view_desc: Show map view option on listings page
config.option_listing_enable_reciprocity_desc: Show reciprocity section on listing detail (member offers/requests)
config.option_wallet_max_transfer_desc: Maximum time credits per single transfer
config.option_wallet_allow_negative_balance_des: Allow members to go into negative time credit balance
config.option_messages_retention_days_desc: How long to keep messages (0 = forever)
config.option_messages_rate_limit_desc: Maximum messages a user can send per hour
config.option_dashboard_show_recent_activity_de: Display recent activity feed on the dashboard
config.option_dashboard_show_quick_actions_desc: Display quick action buttons on the dashboard
config.option_feed_allow_images_desc: Allow members to post images in the feed
config.option_feed_allow_polls_desc: Allow members to create polls in feed posts
config.option_feed_require_moderation_desc: All feed posts must be approved before publishing
config.option_notifications_email_digest_desc: Send daily digest of unread notifications via email
config.option_profile_require_avatar_desc: Members must upload a profile photo
config.option_profile_require_bio_desc: Members must write a bio before accessing the platform
config.option_events_require_rsvp_desc: Members must RSVP to attend events
config.option_events_max_attendees_desc: Default maximum attendees per event (0 = unlimited)
config.option_events_allow_recurring_desc: Allow organizers to create recurring event series
config.option_allow_user_group_creation_desc: Members can create their own groups
config.option_require_group_approval_desc: New groups must be approved by an admin
config.option_max_groups_per_user_desc: Maximum groups a member can join
config.option_profanity_filter_enabled_desc: Enable profanity filtering in group posts
config.option_tab_feed_desc: Show the activity feed tab in groups
config.option_tab_chatrooms_desc: Show the real-time chat channels tab
config.option_tab_analytics_desc: Show the usage analytics tab (admin only)
config.option_gamification_xp_multiplier_desc: Global XP multiplier for all activities
config.option_blog_allow_comments_desc: Allow members to comment on blog posts
config.option_resources_allow_uploads_desc: Allow members to upload resource files
config.option_resources_max_file_size_mb_desc: Maximum upload file size in megabytes
config.option_caring_community_dashboard_enable: Show the integrated Caring Community hub in member navigation
config.option_caring_community_show_municipal_r: Show municipal/canton reporting surfaces when available
config.option_caring_community_show_trust_pack_: Show trust, verification, and compliance prompts when available
config.option_volunteering_tab_hours_desc: View logged volunteer hours and stats
config.option_volunteering_tab_alerts_desc: Receive and respond to emergency shift requests
config.option_volunteering_tab_wellbeing_desc: Burnout risk detection and wellness tracking
config.option_volunteering_tab_waitlist_desc: View shift waitlist status and auto-promotion
config.option_volunteering_tab_swaps_desc: Manage shift swap requests between volunteers
config.option_volunteering_tab_group_signups_de: Group shift reservations with team members
config.option_volunteering_swap_requires_admin_: Shift swaps require admin approval before taking effect
config.option_volunteering_require_org_note_on_: Organisations must provide a reason when declining applications
config.option_volunteering_cancellation_deadlin: How many hours before a shift volunteers can cancel
config.option_volunteering_max_hours_per_shift_: Maximum hours allowed per volunteer shift
config.option_volunteering_hours_require_verifi: Logged hours must be verified/approved before counting
config.option_volunteering_min_hours_for_certif: Minimum verified hours needed to generate a certificate
config.option_volunteering_alert_default_expiry: Default expiry time for emergency alerts
config.option_volunteering_alert_skill_matching: Match emergency alerts to volunteers based on skills
config.option_volunteering_expenses_enabled_des: Allow volunteers to submit expense claims
config.option_volunteering_expense_require_rece: All expense claims must include a receipt
config.option_volunteering_burnout_detection_de: Enable burnout risk scoring and recommendations
config.option_volunteering_guardian_consent_req: Require guardian consent for minor volunteers
config.option_volunteering_enable_qr_checkin_de: Enable QR code check-in/out for shifts
config.option_volunteering_enable_recurring_shi: Allow creation of recurring shift patterns
config.option_volunteering_enable_reviews_desc: Allow volunteers to review organisations and vice versa
config.option_broker_copy_all_messages_desc: Broker receives a copy of all messages
config.option_broker_copy_threshold_hours_desc: Hours threshold for broker message copies
config.option_new_member_monitoring_days_desc: Days to monitor new member messages
config.option_require_exchange_for_listings_des: Require exchange workflow for all listings
config.option_notify_on_high_risk_match_desc: Send notification when high-risk match occurs
config.option_exchange_timeout_days_desc: Days before an exchange request times out
config.option_max_hours_without_approval_desc: Maximum hours that can be exchanged without broker approval
config.option_allow_hour_adjustment_desc: Allow adjusting hours after exchange agreement
config.option_max_hour_variance_percent_desc: Maximum percentage variance allowed for hour adjustments
config.option_broker_visible_to_members_desc: Show broker identity to community members
config.option_show_broker_name_desc: Display broker name in exchange communications
config.option_broker_contact_email_desc: Public contact email for the broker
config.option_copy_first_contact_desc: Broker receives copy of first contact messages
config.option_copy_new_member_messages_desc: Broker receives copy of new member messages
config.option_copy_high_risk_listing_messages_d: Broker receives copy of high-risk listing messages
config.option_random_sample_percentage_desc: Percentage of messages randomly sampled for review
config.option_retention_days_desc: Days to retain broker message copies
config.option_enforce_vetting_on_exchanges_desc: Require vetting before participating in exchanges
config.option_enforce_insurance_on_exchanges_de: Require insurance before participating in exchanges
config.option_vetting_expiry_warning_days_desc: Days before vetting expiry to warn member
config.option_insurance_expiry_warning_days_des: Days before insurance expiry to warn member
config.option_organisations_allow_org_wallets_d: Allow organisations to have their own time credit wallets
config.option_connections_require_mutual_desc: Both parties must accept connection requests
config.option_reviews_require_exchange_desc: Only allow reviews after a completed exchange
config.option_polls_allow_member_creation_desc: Allow regular members to create polls
config.option_polls_show_results_before_close_d: Show poll results before the poll closes
config.option_jobs_require_salary_desc: Job postings must include salary information
config.option_jobs_max_postings_per_user_desc: Maximum active job postings per user
config.option_jobs_default_deadline_days_desc: Default application deadline in days from posting
config.option_jobs_moderation_enabled_desc: Job postings require admin approval before going live
config.option_jobs_spam_detection_desc: Automatically detect and flag spam job postings
config.option_jobs_auto_approve_trusted_desc: Automatically approve postings from trusted employers
config.option_jobs_enable_cv_upload_desc: Allow applicants to upload CVs with applications
config.option_jobs_require_cover_message_desc: Applications must include a cover message
config.option_jobs_enable_blind_hiring_desc: Enable blind hiring mode (hide applicant identity)
config.option_jobs_enable_featured_desc: Allow admins to feature/boost job postings
config.option_jobs_featured_duration_days_desc: Default number of days a job stays featured
config.option_jobs_enable_ai_descriptions_desc: Allow employers to generate descriptions using AI
config.option_jobs_enable_skills_matching_desc: Show skills match percentage on job listings
config.option_jobs_enable_templates_desc: Allow employers to save and reuse job templates
config.option_jobs_enable_rss_feed_desc: Generate public RSS/JSON feeds for job listings
config.option_jobs_enable_saved_profiles_desc: Allow applicants to save profile for quick applications
config.option_ideation_max_votes_per_user_desc: Maximum votes a member can cast per challenge
config.option_dm_require_connection_desc: Only allow DMs between connected members
config.option_group_exchanges_min_participants_: Minimum participants for a group exchange
config.option_search_include_members_desc: Include member profiles in search results
config.option_ai_chat_daily_message_limit_desc: Maximum AI chat messages per user per day (0 = unlimited)
config.option_ai_chat_show_context_sources_desc: Show which community data the AI referenced
config.option_marketplace_enabled_desc: Master switch to enable the marketplace module
config.option_marketplace_allow_shipping_desc: Enable shipping options for marketplace listings
config.option_marketplace_allow_free_items_desc: Enable a free items section in the marketplace
config.option_marketplace_allow_business_seller: Allow business accounts to sell in the marketplace
config.option_marketplace_allow_hybrid_pricing_: Allow items priced with both time credits and cash
config.option_marketplace_escrow_enabled_desc: Enable escrow buyer protection for transactions
config.option_marketplace_platform_fee_percent_: Platform take rate percentage on marketplace sales
config.option_marketplace_moderation_enabled_de: Marketplace listings require admin approval before going live
config.option_marketplace_max_images_desc: Maximum number of images per marketplace listing
config.option_marketplace_max_active_listings_d: Maximum active marketplace listings per user
config.option_marketplace_listing_duration_days: Number of days before marketplace listings auto-expire
config.option_identity_verification_fee_cents_d: One-time fee charged for identity verification. Set to 0 for free verification. Value in cents (e.g. 500 = €5.00)

tenant_features.maps_kill_switch_desc: When off: no map components render and no Google map tiles are requested. Address autocomplete continues to work via the chosen provider below, including Google Places if selected.
tenant_features.map_provider_desc: Which service renders interactive maps. Google = paid, Places-quality. OpenStreetMap = free, community-maintained.
tenant_features.geocoding_provider_desc: Powers location search across registration, listings, events, groups, and volunteering. Always on — only the provider is configurable. Google Places is paid; Nominatim is free, slightly slower, and rate-limited.
tenant_features.api_keys_intro: Set this tenant's own API keys here so the bill goes to the tenant's account, not yours. Leave a field blank to fall back to the platform default. Browser API keys are necessarily public when used; protect them via Console-side restrictions (HTTP referrer, IP, allowed APIs).
tenant_features.google_maps_api_key_hint: Used for both map display (Google branch) and Places autocomplete. One key with both APIs enabled is the typical setup. Get one at console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials.
tenant_features.google_map_id_hint: A Map ID enables custom Cloud-based map styling. Leave blank for default styling.
tenant_features.maptiler_api_key_label: MapTiler API key (paid OSM tile host)
tenant_features.maptiler_api_key_hint: Only used when this tenant's map_provider is OpenStreetMap. Switches from the free tile.openstreetmap.org service (subject to OSMF policy at scale) to MapTiler's paid host with proper dark mode and high-throughput tile delivery. Free tier covers ~100k tiles/month. Get a key at maptiler.com → Cloud → API keys.
tenant_features.google_key_cleared: Google key cleared — using platform default
tenant_features.maptiler_key_cleared: MapTiler key cleared — using free OSM tiles
tenant_features.default_language_hint: The language users see by default on this platform
tenant_features.available_languages_hint: Choose which languages members can switch to
tenant_features.desc_caring_community: Integrated care hub, Caring Community workflow, and municipal care reporting
tenant_features.desc_events: Community events with RSVP and calendar
tenant_features.desc_exchange_workflow: Formal exchange request and approval flow
tenant_features.desc_job_vacancies: Post and apply for job opportunities
tenant_features.desc_maps: Map display and place-name autocomplete. Disable map display as a kill switch when usage costs spike; autocomplete stays controlled by the geocoding provider. Billing is per-tenant on the Google Cloud account.
tenant_features.desc_reviews: Ratings and reviews for members and exchanges
tenant_features.desc_wallet: Time credit wallet and transaction history
tenant_features.desc_ai_agents: Autonomous AI agents that propose actions and assist with platform operations
tenant_features.desc_member_premium: One-off and recurring donations with supporter recognition, not paid features
tenant_features.desc_merchant_coupons: Discount coupons issued by marketplace merchants (requires Marketplace)
tenant_features.desc_message_translation: Auto-translate direct messages between members who speak different languages
tenant_features.desc_newsletter: Email newsletter campaigns, subscribers, segments, and analytics
tenant_features.desc_partner_api: Allow external partners to integrate with this tenant via the Partner API
tenant_features.desc_regional_analytics: Paid regional analytics product — monthly reports for municipalities and regional bodies
tenant_features.cost_warning: This tenant is configured to use paid Google services. Google Places autocomplete is typically the largest cost driver — sessions are billed per keystroke burst. Switch to Nominatim to remove that bill component entirely.
tenant_features.maps_policy_desc: Map view is globally disabled. Google Places autocomplete remains active via the geocoding provider below.
tenant_features.os_maps_api_key_hint: OS Data Hub project key for the OS Maps API. Used when the map provider is Ordnance Survey; UK public-sector tenants are typically covered by the PSGA. Without a key, Ordnance Survey tenants fall back to free OpenStreetMap tiles.
tenant_features.tiles_status_os_maps_unset: No key — falls back to free OSM
